title: Mogburg
description: A Minecraft Modpack for the Official Mogburg Minecraft SMP
body:
# MOGBURG

Looking for a world where magic, machines, and creative building all come together? Mogburg has you covered.

# 🔧 Main Mods:
Create – Build complex contraptions and automate everything

Bewitchment – Dive into classic witchcraft and rituals

Malum – Embrace the dark side with powerful soul magic

# 🌄 World Features:
Custom Terrain – Huge, flat plains and towering mountains make the world feel epic

Tons of Building Mods – Everything you need to design your dream base or town

Whether you're here to automate, cast spells, or just build something beautiful, Mogburg gives you the tools to make it yours.
